changes.summary: Optional boolean (defaults to true). When false, attributes marked as deprecated in the provider schema are omitted from exported configuration. Changing this value forces replacement of the export resource.
Changing export_deprecated forces replacement of the genesyscloud_tf_export resource.
When export_deprecated is false, deprecated schema attributes are omitted from exported configuration; the default true preserves prior behavior that included deprecated attributes.
Schema-based exclusions for computed, read-only computed, and deprecated attributes now apply recursively to nested block attributes and run before output sanitization.

related_export_changes.summary: Exported configuration for any resource type may omit nested block attributes that are computed, read-only computed, or deprecated, where those nested fields were previously left in place.
When export_deprecated is set to false, deprecated attributes are omitted from exported configuration across all exported resource types that define them.
